events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: the condition is a direct copper-to-steel transition with no dielectric union — a galvanic corrosion hazard that violates IPC 605.14 material-transition requirements and dielectric fitting listings. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, with corrective action to cut in a listed dielectric union before the rough-in is closed out.
